name: threejs-game-skills
description: Self-contained skills for building playable, polished Three.js browser games.

scripts.check:scripts: bash -n install.sh scripts/validate-skills.sh plugins/skills/threejs-game-director/scripts/probe_asset_credentials.sh && node --check plugins/skills/threejs-qa-release/scripts/inspect-threejs-canvas.mjs && python3 scripts/check-python-syntax.py scripts/check-python-syntax.py plugins/skills/threejs-gameplay-systems/scripts/create_threejs_game.py plugins/skills/threejs-3d-generator/scripts/threejs_3d_asset.py plugins/skills/threejs-image-generator/scripts/generate_image.py plugins/skills/threejs-audio-generator/scripts/threejs_audio_asset.py plugins/skills/threejs-game-director/scripts/audit_reference_report.py
